subject: Great XM deals wherever you go
body:
XM: ARE YOU ON?

--YOU'LL WANT TO LISTEN --IN YOUR CAR OR ON THE GO. --
YOU MIGHT NEVER WANT TO TURN IT OFF!

----------------------------------------------------------------

Dear JEFFREY EPSTEIN,

With XM you get over 170 channels including commercial-free 
music, exclusive live performances, every MLB(R) game and more. 
And there's so much more to explore…
----------------------------------------------------------------
• Hear more great commercial-free music channels
• Check out XMX(TM)– the home for exclusive concerts and original series hosted  
  by music legends like Bob Dylan, Tom Petty and more 
• Get non-stop sports action with every MLB(R) team and game plus the PGA TOUR, 
  NHL and college sports play-by-play 
• Stay current with CNN, FOX News Channel and the new POTUS '08(TM) -- our 
  presidential election channel 

----------------------------------------------------------------
ENJOY XM IN YOUR CAR OR ON THE GO.
Check out great deals for yourself or as a gift.

SAVE $40
XpressEZ(TM) NOW $24.99

Listening made easy

SAVE $70
inno(R) NOW $179.99

Listening on the go
  
----------------------------------------------------------------
To visit the XpressEZ(TM), please go to:
http://xmradio.chtah.com/a/tBIVo5jB7RCeLB7RTMK$AHapTrk/xm5

To visit the inno(R), please go to:
http://xmradio.chtah.com/a/tBIVo5jB7RCeLB7RTMK$AHapTrk/xm1
----------------------------------------------------------------
Having XM is like having a soundtrack to your life. Come on. 
Don’t miss another minute. 

Limited time offer. Call us at 1-888-243-4296 or go to:
http://xmradio.chtah.com/a/tBIVo5jB7RCeLB7RTMK$AHapTrk/xm9
----------------------------------------------------------------
P.S. XM is a great gift for grads!
XMROTRLR2D25												RO4 

----------------------------------------------------------------

Offer expires 9/30/08 while supplies last. Nonrefundable 
prepayment of three (3) months of service required, and service 
will renew on quarterly payment terms after initial three (3) 
months. Subject to $100 early cancellation fee if twelve (12) 
months of continuous service is not maintained. You must be 
authorized to redeem this offer. Exclusive offer cannot be 
combined with other offers, and is only valid in the 48 
contiguous United States. Other fees and programming subject 
to change. Games subject to availability and change. 
Subscription subject to Customer Agreement available at 
xmradio.com. XM service only available in the 48 contiguous 
United States. NHL.com is the official Web site of the National 
Hockey League. NHL is a registered trademark and the NHL Shield 
is a trademark of the National Hockey League. All NHL logos and 
marks depicted herein are the property of the NHL and may not 
be reproduced without the prior written consent of NHL 
Enterprises, L. P. (C) NHL 2008. All Rights Reserved. (C) 2008 
MLB Advanced Media, L.P. All rights reserved. All Major League 
Baseball trademarks and service marks used herein are the 
property of the applicable MLB entity. All other marks used 
herein are trademarks or registered trademarks of their 
respective owners.

To ensure receipt of your XM emails, please add 
xmradio@email.xmradio.com to your address book. 
You are receiving this email because you previously indicated 
that you’d like to receive email updates from XM Satellite 
Radio. 
To unsubscribe, please visit http://xmradio.chtah.com/a/tBIVo5jB7RCeLB7RTMK$AHapTrk/xm13 
----------------------------------------------------------------
XM Satellite Radio, 1500 
Eckington Place, NE. Washington, DC 20002
